description: Cohort-relative display calibration: maps within-sport latent percentile to consumer-facing gravity score.
rationale: Latent G from BPXVR composite preserves rank order within sport. Piecewise-linear knots shape the display distribution without per-athlete hardcoding: bulk IQR (p25-p75) targets 62-72, upper tier (p85-p97) 76-88, elite tail (p99+) 93-99. Knots are global; cohort percentiles are sport-specific.

nil_anchor.rationale: Observed NIL (nil_valuation_observed=1) anchors display floor via log(NIL) mapping. elite_weight scales floor by commercial signal strength so non-elite observed labels are not over-boosted.
